title: Block Ram Synthesis in ECP5
body:
I seem to be having an issue where when I attempt to use Yosys to synthesis block memory, namely the SP16KD 18K block for the ECP5, it instead defaults to the DPR16X4 distributed RAM instead.

I have been able to force the synthesis of the BRAM using the -nolutram flag in synth_ecp5, however it was at this point that I ran into a new issue, namely that the address bit higher than the 4th bit were not being used, as well as the synthesis generating a dual port ram rather than a single port ram, though this may be a limitation of prjtrellis, as in the support they state DP16KD, and not SP16KD.

This was true for both the distributed and the block ram, despite having a nine bit address as per the ECP5 memory guides' SP16KD 36 bit wide databuse configuration.

This was produced using the latest nightly build from the OSS-CAD-SUITE

Below is the verilog module used in the synthesis:

module bram (
	input clk, write,
	input [35:0] din,
	input [8:0] addr,
	output reg [35:0] dout
);

reg [35:0] ram [0:8];

always @ (posedge clk)
	if (write)
		ram[addr][35:0] <= din;

always @ (posedge clk)
	if (~write)
		dout <= ram[addr][35:0];

endmodule


Then to create the issue one can run yosys -p "read_verilog _filename.v_ ; synth_ecp5 -top bram"
to generate the distributed ram or

yosys -p "read_verilog _filename.v_ ; synth_ecp5 -top bram -nolutram"

to force BRAM generation

The expected behavior is the synthesis of 1 SP16KD block, while in reality it synthesizes with 9 DPR16X4 blocks or one DP16KD block, which is acceptable if the addresses were correctly populated.

![pic-selected-220718-2320-18](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/33011991/179657427-b666e127-596b-4ba5-a661-3365f6789498.png)

This is an example image from the BRAM, where the only address bits into the DP16KD are the first four bits (3:0) rather than the specified 9 bits (8:0)

I am not too familiar with the Yosys output from synthesizing, but I have put it here:

[https://pastebin.com/0J0Vbh3f](Link)
